creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
There is new version og phplist which was released on April 2014

Fix:
--------------------------------------- cut ---------------------------------------
diff -ruN phplist/Makefile phplist.new/Makefile
--- phplist/Makefile	2014-05-29 20:41:42.000000000 +0200
+++ phplist.new/Makefile	2014-06-04 11:48:22.749755000 +0200
@@ -2,8 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/mail/phplist/Makefile 355723 2014-05-29 18:41:42Z cs $
 
 PORTNAME=	phplist
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.5
-PORTREVISION=	2
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.6
 CATEGORIES=	mail www
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tgz

--- phplist/distinfo	2013-12-26 00:05:01.000000000 +0100
+++ phplist.new/distinfo	2014-06-04 11:51:26.755754000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SIZE (phplist-3.0.6.tgz) = 7160394
